channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fans Gather in New York for Stephen Colbert’s Final Late Show Episode
item.description: Fans of Stephen Colbert braved rainy weather outside the Ed Sullivan Theater in New York City on Thursday to witness the final taping of 'The Late Show with Stephen Colbert.' The event marked the end ...

item.title: Pep Guardiola to leave Manchester City; England announces World Cup squad with several surprises
item.description: Pep Guardiola will depart Manchester City at the end of the season, ending a decade-long tenure that transformed the club into one of English football’s most dominant sides. Since taking over in 2016,...

item.title: Tanzanian Opposition Aide David Djumbe Escapes Abduction and Assault in Bunju Forest

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo releases heartfelt single 'The Cure' from upcoming album
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo has unveiled her latest single, 'The Cure', which she describes as her favourite track from her forthcoming album, 'You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl So In Love'. Scheduled for release on ...

item.title: NSW plans to control rising brumby numbers in Kosciuszko National Park
item.description: Recent surveys in Kosciuszko National Park have revealed a significant increase in the feral brumby population, with estimates ranging from 6,476 to over 16,000 horses. This marks a sharp rebound from...

item.title: U.S. Nuclear Policy Highlights Double Standards Between Israel and Iran
item.description: This article examines the stark double standards in U.S. nuclear policy, contrasting how Israel and Iran are treated differently despite nuclear realities. Israel possesses an undeclared nuclear arsen...

item.title: Senate Republicans Face Challenges as Trump's Favorability Declines Ahead of Midterms

item.title: Senator Padilla Explains Bato dela Rosa's Departure from Senate Amid ICC Warrant

item.title: NPFL to decide 2025/26 season champions and relegation battles in final matches

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Val Kilmer and Meg Ryan in Oliver Stone’s 'The Doors' (1991)
item.description: The 1991 film 'The Doors,' directed by Oliver Stone, remains an iconic and visually striking biopic of the legendary rock band. Val Kilmer’s performance as Jim Morrison is widely acclaimed for its imm...

item.title: Dutch Navy Ship HNLMS De Ruyter Arrives in the Philippines to Strengthen Bilateral Maritime Cooperation

item.title: Karachi Court Places Anmol 'Pinky' Under Judicial Custody in 18 Cases Involving Drugs and Murder

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo ends five-year trophy drought as Al-Nassr wins Saudi Pro League
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has ended his five-year wait for a major club trophy as Al-Nassr secured the 2025-26 Saudi Pro League title with a 4-1 win against Damac. The victory was powered by goals from Sadio ...

item.title: The Artistic Legacy of Joseph Karl Stieler, Bavarian Court Painter

item.title: Cultural Exchange and Challenges at the 2026 Football World Cup in the U.S.

item.title: Parents of Southport Attack Survivors Speak Out About Challenges of Anonymity
item.description: Parents of children who survived the Southport knife attack in July 2024 have expressed concern that the court-imposed anonymity for their daughters has led to a lack of support and public recognition...
